description_long: This object is a rectangular filing cabinet with a broad, flat top and smooth, slightly beveled edges. The main body is constructed from a wood-like material with a warm brown finish, framed by metallic or painted trim along the vertical edges and base. The cabinet appears solid and robust, with no visible handles, drawers, or label holders on any side, suggesting a minimalist or modern design. The top surface is wide and flat, suitable for supporting additional objects or documents. The overall appearance is clean and functional, with a focus on durability and simplicity. Its design is suitable for placement in professional or utilitarian environments such as offices, archives, or storage rooms.
description: A solid, rectangular filing cabinet with a wood-like finish and metallic trim, featuring a flat, broad top and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing a wide, flat surface with metallic trim on the sides and base, no visible handles or drawers.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the cabinet and the continuation of the metallic trim along the vertical edges.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view, nearly identical to the front, with a broad, uninterrupted wood-like panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side, with metallic trim and a solid wood-like panel.
